FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-07-2011 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Continued To Feb-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for for Catherine Murray.

Ms. Eisenberg stated that the Trust was not submitted to the Court and that supposedly the Beneficiary plans on waiving the final account. The matter was continued to February 7, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the waiver or the accounting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Continued To Jan-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-89-235802 Conservatorship of Robert McMahon.

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for Scott Murray.

Ms. Eisenberg stated that Mr. Murray was out of the country. The matter was continued to January 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
